description: Rotate the client secret for a confidential OAuth2 client

parameters.name: client-id
parameters.description: OAuth2 client ID to rotate the secret for

validation_rules: Only confidential clients (auth_method: client_secret_basic or client_secret_post) can have secrets rotated
Only the client owner can rotate the secret
The new secret is returned only once and must be stored securely

errors.remediation: Only the client owner can rotate the secret
Check the client ID and try again

errors.description: Cannot rotate secret for public client
errors.remediation: Only confidential clients support secret rotation

examples.note: Save the returned clientSecret immediately — it will NOT be shown again

output.warning: The clientSecret is returned only once. Store it securely immediately.
